sanskrit:
अशास्त्रविहितं घोरं तप्यन्ते ये तपो जनाः।
दम्भाहङ्कारसंयुक्ताः कामरागबलान्विताः॥
कर्षयन्तः शरीरस्थं भूतग्राममचेतसः।
मां चैवान्तः शरीरस्थं तान्विद्ध्यासुरनिश्चयान्॥
transliteration:
aśāstra-vihitaṃ ghoraṃ tapyante ye tapo janāḥ |
dambhāhaṅkāra-saṃyuktāḥ kāma-rāga-balānvitāḥ ||
karṣayantaḥ śarīrasthaṃ bhūta-grāmam acetasaḥ |
māṃ caivāntaḥ śarīrasthaṃ tān viddhy āsura-niścayān ||
literal_meaning: Not-scripture-enjoined / terrible / they-afflict / who / austerity / people // pride-ego-possessed / desire-attachment-force-driven // tormenting / body-dwelling / element-aggregate / un-minded / Me / also-indeed-within / body-dwelling / them / know / demon-determined //
contextual_meaning: Self-punishing behaviors performed for ego inflation, control, or revenge—disguised as virtue—damage both body and the indwelling witness-consciousness; they are psychologically demonic.
psychological_state: Narcissistic defense against core shame through performative self-harm and moral superiority.
trigger_scenario: Going on a hunger-strike to shame an ex-partner on social media while claiming it's for 'world peace'.
anchor_text: True discipline never harms the body or the awareness quietly living within it.
